message:
chore(beads,ubs): add new open issues and refresh full-project UBS scan

Add two new open issues to .beads/issues.jsonl:
- bd-2mm8: Expand crash-consistency E2E matrix for ext4+btrfs write paths
  (priority 1: add 8 ext4 crash scenarios and 9 btrfs FUSE E2E write tests)
- bd-4y8f: Add btrfs kernel_reference golden tests matching ext4 coverage pattern
  (priority 2: real mkfs.btrfs image → parse → compare to committed golden JSON)
- bd-0ypb: Publish criterion benchmark baselines with regression detection
  (priority 2: capture baselines, configure thresholds, document in BENCHMARKS.md)

Refresh cli-ubs.txt with a new full-project UBS scan (project root, 246 MB
workspace) dated 2026-04-06, replacing the prior ffs-cli/src-only scan.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
